today_expressions.english: I'm allergic to nuts, no nut meals please.
today_expressions.chinese: 我对坚果过敏，请不要给我含坚果的餐

today_expressions.english: Can I have a vegetarian meal please?
today_expressions.chinese: 请问我可以要一份素食餐吗？

today_expressions.english: I don't eat beef, can I get another option?
today_expressions.chinese: 我不吃牛肉，能给我换另一种餐吗？

today_expressions.english: Do you have lactose-free meals available?
today_expressions.chinese: 你们有没有不含乳糖的餐食呀？

today_expressions.english: Please don't add any sauce to my meal.
today_expressions.chinese: 请不要给我的餐食加任何酱料
